workshops.title: CAD for competition
workshops.description: Laying out a competition drivetrain from a blank sketch: constraints, part reuse, and keeping an assembly manufacturable under a 120-hour clock.
prereqs: A laptop with Onshape or Fusion access

workshops.title: Control system wiring
workshops.description: Wiring a legal control system end to end — power distribution, CAN topology, and the inspection checks that most commonly fail on the first pass.
prereqs: Familiarity with the FRC control system
